title: piquetia pillansii
intro: Piquetia pillansii, also known as the Cape plum or Piquetia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Piquetia pillansii include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever and digestive issues. Piquetia pillansii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
